title: UPSC NDA I Exam Result 2026
short_information: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has released National Defence Academy NDA & NA First Examination 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are Enrolled in this UPSC NDA I Vacancy 2026 can Download Admit Card / Hall Ticket / E Call Letter. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information. Union Public Service Commission UPSC NDA & NA I Recruitment 2026 UPSC NDA I Advt No. 03/2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS : 100/- SC / ST : 0/- Female : 0/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking UPSC NDA I

tables.table_name: UPSC NDA I Notification 2025 : Age Limit Only unmarried male/female candidates born not earlier than 01st Jul 2007 and not later than 01st July 2010 are eligible Minimum Age : 16.5 Year Maximum Age : 19.5 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per UPSC NDA I Recruitment Rules.
